policy.screenshots: Blocked entries require a real, current, redacted capture. No placeholder or synthetic UI image is shipped.
policy.syntheticSamples: CSV samples are fictional, UTF-8, contain no personal information, and are only for Day 18 upload practice.

assets.privacyReview: pass: fictional aggregate sales only; no identifiers
patterns: Saturday and Sunday iced americano quantity is 25 and 22 each week (47 per weekend).
Friday croissant quantity is 20 each week.
Delivery appears only on Monday and Thursday rows (12 and 9 units).
assets.evidence: Six identical seven-day cycles; the stated values are directly visible in the 42 rows.

assets.privacyReview: pass: fictional aggregate orders only; no customer or order identifiers
patterns: Saturday and Sunday gift-set quantity is 30 and 26 each week (56 per weekend).
Friday gift-set revenue is 270000 every week.
Marketplace appears only on Saturday and Sunday.
assets.evidence: Six identical seven-day cycles; the stated values are directly visible in the 42 rows.

assets.privacyReview: pass: fictional daily aggregates only; no client or appointment data
patterns: Saturday reservations are 12 with 10 attendees and 2 cancellations every week.
Monday has 2 cancellations every week, higher than Tuesday through Friday (1) and Sunday (0).
Sunday clinic reservations are 6 with all 6 attendees every week.
assets.evidence: Six identical seven-day cycles; the stated values are directly visible in the 42 rows.

assets.privacyReview: pass: fictional generic reviews only; no people, contacts, order details, or identifiers
patterns: Every Friday review is rating 3 in the wait-time category.
Every Saturday and Sunday review is rating 5 in the kindness category.
Every Wednesday review is rating 5 in the taste category.
assets.evidence: Six identical seven-day cycles; the stated values are directly visible in the 42 rows.
